description: A tenant wants to report a potential housing code violation (e.g., no heating) against their landlord.

nodes.task_description: Gather information from the tenant, including their address, landlord's contact info, and the specific nature of the complaint.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent documents the details of the alleged violation.

nodes.task_description: Log the complaint in the code enforcement system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a new case file for the complaint.

nodes.task_description: Inform the tenant of their rights and the next steps, which will involve an inspector contacting the landlord.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides clear information and sets expectations for the tenant.
